# FitLabReviews.com — AI Crawler Guide
# https://fitlabreviews.com/llms.txt
# Updated: 2026-04-12

## About FitLabReviews

FitLabReviews is an independent supplement review website. No paid placements.
All reviews are written by Jake Reynolds (CISSN, NSCA-CPT) using clinical research and personal testing.

## Content Summary

- **Supplement Reviews**: Deep ingredient analysis, macros, side effects, pricing for protein powders, creatine, pre-workouts, and fat burners
- **Brand Pages**: Independent brand ratings (0-10) across 26 supplement brands on ingredient quality, clinical dosing, transparency, and value
- **Best Of Lists**: Ranked comparisons across protein powders, pre-workouts, creatine, fat burners, sleep supplements
- **Ingredient Guides**: Science-backed ingredient pages covering 30+ key supplement ingredients
- **Blog**: Sports nutrition science content

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://fitlabreviews.com/
- Reviews Index: https://fitlabreviews.com/reviews.html
- Brand Ratings: https://fitlabreviews.com/brands.html
- Best Protein Powders: https://fitlabreviews.com/best/best-protein-powders.html
- Best Pre-Workouts: https://fitlabreviews.com/best/best-pre-workouts.html

- ON Gold Standard 100% Whey: 9.8/10 — https://fitlabreviews.com/reviews/on-gold-standard-whey-review-2026.html
- Transparent Labs BULK Black: 9.4/10 — https://fitlabreviews.com/reviews/transparent-labs-bulk-black-review.html

## Disclosure

Affiliate links used throughout. Brand scores are never influenced by affiliate relationships.
